name: Sheepherder Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift the dry ingredients and make a well in the center.
2. Add the sourdough starter to the well and mix with enough flour using your hands until smooth and shiny.
3. Transfer the dough to a greased bowl and let it rise until almost doubled.
4. Shape into 2 loaves and place them in greased bread pans.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) until done.
